sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Find answers to common questions about StreamVista

questions.question: What is IPTV?
questions.answer: IPTV (Internet Protocol Television) delivers television content over Internet Protocol networks. It offers a more convenient and flexible way to watch TV compared to traditional cable or satellite services.

questions.question: How many devices can I connect?
questions.answer: Depending on your subscription plan, you can connect between 2 to unlimited devices simultaneously.

questions.question: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not completely satisfied with our service.

questions.question: What internet speed do I need?
questions.answer: We recommend a minimum internet speed of 10 Mbps for HD streaming and 25 Mbps for 4K content.
